description: Your team's CI/CD pipeline requires a local Docker registry for air-gapped deployments. Deploy the Python API service from /home/ga/api-service/ using a local Docker registry (registry:2) on port 5000. The image must be pushed to the registry with tags 'localhost:5000/api-service:v1.0.0' and 'localhost:5000/api-service:latest'. The deployment must use a docker-compose.yml at /home/ga/api-service/docker-compose.yml that references the registry image (not a build directive) and ensures the API responds on port 7080. Login: ga / password123
